content.json:
# Foundry Governance Observability

Auditability, safety, and access-trail insights for governance stakeholders. Based on OpenTelemetry GenAI spans (`invoke_agent`, `execute_tool`) emitted by Foundry prompt agents.

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'invoke_agent'
| extend actorDisplay = coalesce(user_AuthenticatedId, user_Id, cloud_RoleName)
| extend targetAgent = tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.agent.name'])
| extend conversationId = tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.conversation.id'])
| project timestamp, actorDisplay, targetAgent, conversationId, success, resultCode, duration_ms=duration
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: who ran what

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| extend safetyCategory = tostring(customDimensions['safetyCategory'])
| extend safetySeverity = tostring(customDimensions['safetySeverity'])
| where isnotempty(safetyCategory) or message has 'safety'
| summarize eventCount=count() by bin(timestamp, 1h), safetyCategory, safetySeverity
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: safety outcomes

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) in ('invoke_agent', 'execute_tool')
| extend actorDisplay = coalesce(user_AuthenticatedId, user_Id, cloud_RoleName)
| extend target = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.agent.name']), tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.tool.name']))
| summarize actions=count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), actorDisplay, target
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: access trail

content.query:
let agentRuns = dependencies
  | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'invoke_agent';
let baseline =
  agentRuns
  | where timestamp between (ago(14d) .. ago(1d))
  | summarize bucketCount=count() by hour=hourofday(timestamp), bin(timestamp, 1h)
  | summarize baselineCount=avg(bucketCount) by hour;
let current =
  agentRuns
  | where timestamp > ago(24h)
  | summarize currentCount=count() by hour=hourofday(timestamp), bin(timestamp, 1h);
current
| join kind=leftouter baseline on hour
| extend spikeFactor = iff(isnull(baselineCount) or baselineCount == 0.0, real(null), todouble(currentCount) / baselineCount)
| extend offHours = hour < 6 or hour > 20
| where offHours or spikeFactor > 2.0
| project timestamp, hour, currentCount, baselineCount, spikeFactor, offHours
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: anomaly flags

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where message has_any ('policy','drift','configuration','diagnostic','workspace')
| summarize changeCount=count() by bin(timestamp, 1d), cloud_RoleName, operation_Name
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: config policy drift

content.json:
### Access Model
Default shared viewer role is supported for both dashboards.
Governance audit views display full actor identity by default.
